mapper.delete:
delete from course where id in (
#{id}
mapper.select: select c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.credit, c.hours, c.type, t.name as teacher_name, (select count(*) from course_selection cs where cs.course_id = c.id and cs.status = '已选') as selected_count, c.capacity from course c left join course_schedule cs2 on c.id = cs2.course_id left join teacher t on cs2.teacher_id = t.id where (c.type = '选修' or c.type = '公选') and c.status = '开课' and (select count(*) from course_selection cs where cs.course_id = c.id and cs.status = '已选') < c.capacity
